name: Comet Busters
short_description: Comet Busters is a game similar to asteroids with it's own flare and uniqueness. You pilot the Destiny, an ancient warship converted to a mining vessel. It has advanced weaponry such as bombs, missiles, laser bullets, and spread fire bullets. You will face enemies and unique bosses.
detailed_description:
In the not-so-distant future, the Kepler-442 Asteroid Field has become a battleground. Red warships hunt without mercy. Blue patrols guard with fragile honor. Green corporate drones strip-mine with ruthless speed. And the enigmatic Purple Sentinels watch from the shadows.

You pilot the DESTINY—an ancient warship of unknown origin, reborn as a mining vessel and armed to the teeth. With rapid-fire cannons, advanced thrusters, drone missiles, and omnidirectional fire at your command, you must survive the chaos.

Features:

* Dynamic Combat System: Dodge incoming fire, destroy asteroids and enemy ships, and unleash powerful weapons

* Advanced Arsenal: Unlock missiles, bombs, and spread-fire capabilities as you progress

* Boss Battles: Face off against six colossal mega-ships with unique attack patterns and spectacular explosion effects

* Difficulty Modes: Choose Easy, Medium, or Hard for tailored challenges

* Procedural Wave System: Survive 30 waves of escalating danger with enemy variety and tactical bosses

* Shield & Energy Systems: Manage your shields and energy reserves for strategic survival

  • High Score Tracking: Climb the leaderboard and claim your place among the elite (local only)

* Mouse, Keyboard & Joystick support: Play your way—Joystick includes Haptic support

Immersive Narrative: Experience an opening crawl, boss encounters, and a conclusion that redefines your mission

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian
